source_pr.title: planner: try to fix some unstable test cases about partition table statistics
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: related to #24010, #24013, #24014, #24015, #24679 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: planner: try to fix some unstable test cases about partition table statistics

### What is changed and how it works?

No logical change, just create some separate DBs and tables for each test case to isolate their effect.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- planner: try to fix some unstable test cases about partition table statistics

symptoms: planner: try to fix some unstable test cases about partition table statistics
failure_signature: planner: try to fix some unstable test cases about partition table statistics
root_cause_explanation: Partition-statistics related tests shared DB/table names and state, causing cross-test interference and order-dependent flakes. The fix isolates tests by creating separate DBs/tables for each test case so they don't pollute each other.
fix_pattern: Use per-test unique DB/table names (and cleanup) to isolate partition statistics tests and avoid cross-test state pollution.

evidence: evidence: planner: try to fix some unstable test cases about partition table statistics
